title: アグネスタキオン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the purpose of understanding the latent
potential of the Umamusume body and its limits,
Agnes Tachyon spends much of her time
conducting research in the pursuit of speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through the Twinkle Series, our days together in
search of the limits of Umamusume potential
begin.
